key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 15 (Extreme Fear) and worsening — historically a contrarian buying zone, but caution warranted as capitulation may not be complete.
Headline confirms Solana ecosystem tokens leading the crypto rebound alongside Aave, validating SOL's relative strength as a narrative-driven move.
SOL reclaimed $72 but on-chain data flags weakening momentum — a cautionary signal that tempers conviction and supports tighter stop-loss placement.
SOL 24h volume at $4.1B significantly elevated relative to other top-20 coins, suggesting real buying interest rather than just a dead-cat bounce.
ETH derivatives reset signals broader market positioning flush, which often precedes relief rallies — supportive of near-term bounce thesis.
